Name: traveling-salesman
Description: City/neighborhood/address TSP research domain. Normalizes a finite weighted graph, validates explicit ordered-tour witnesses, measures residual search, and keeps optimality outside the current trust boundary.

ProjectTranspilers.Name: minimizerulebook
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Generate compact schema/data projections for the TSP rulebook.

ProjectTranspilers.Name: rulebooktopostgres
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Generate the Postgres schema, functions, views, and seed data.

ProjectTranspilers.Name: rulebooktorulespeak
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Generate a human-readable narrative of the represented TSP semantics.
